M1018_PR_INTR_PAIN M1018 (M0220) Prior Condition- Intractable Pain This field is checked if the patient had intractable pain prior to the inpatient stay or change in medical or treatment regimen within the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M1018_PR_MEM_LOSS M1018 (M0220) Prior Condition- Memory Loss This field is checked if the patient had memory loss to the extent that supervision was required
